description: GPO local retrieval policy — governs how context is retrieved, cached, and reused
principles: Retrieve only relevant chunks, not whole files
Scope retrieval by project, engine, and artifact class
Do not flood prompts with excessive context
Cache stable truths, refresh time-sensitive facts
Make retrieval behavior visible and reviewable

stable_user_truths.description: Operator preferences, style, dislikes — reuse unless contradicted

semi_stable_context.description: Current project priorities, engine focus, active goals

retrieval_scopes.global: Operator profile, global signals, system docs
retrieval_scopes.engine: Engine-specific signals, mission context, engine case history
retrieval_scopes.project: Project-specific preferences, prior task outputs in project
retrieval_scopes.task: Prior subtask outputs within current task

cost_reduction_targets.avoid_redundant_web_search: Check if recent similar search exists before calling Perplexity
cost_reduction_targets.avoid_full_file_reads: Use chunked retrieval for large state files
